prompt: Write an Eluna lua script for my AzerothCore server: the first time a player ever logs in on a character, give them 5 gold and a Hearthstone (item 6948), and whisper them a welcome message with their name. Save it as a single .lua file.

assertions.text: Registers first-login hook via RegisterPlayerEvent event id 30 (ON_FIRST_LOGIN), not ON_LOGIN
Callback first param is event, second is player
5 gold via copper math (ModifyMoney(50000)), not ModifyMoney(5)
